title: Rule Selection Audit Telemetry
acceptance_criteria: Events include target paths, required ids, AI-selectable ids, AI-selected ids, final ids, selection reasons, rejected/ignored ids, and timestamp.
readAuditLog can parse existing get_rules/edit_intent and new rule_selection entries.

implementation.description: Write failing audit-log and section-service tests for rule_selection telemetry.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail because audit-log union/helper lacks rule_selection support.

implementation.description: Add rule_selection audit entry type, append helper, parser support, and service integration.
Keep audit event shape stable and reuse existing append/read utilities without adding a new state file.
quality_checks: Telemetry includes complete AI selection reasons.
